title: senecio octobracteatus var. durangensis
intro: Senecio octobracteatus var. durangensis, also known as Durango ragwort, is a plant species in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Senecio. The medicinal properties of Durango ragwort are attributed to its alkaloid content, including senecionine, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can also help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Durango ragwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity.
